problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
